home.title: Welcome
home.subtitle: This site was built in multiple languages from a single codebase.

about.title: About
about.text1: This is a static site generated from translation JSON files. Each language produces its own standalone build.
about.text2: The build system validates every translation against a schema, builds all languages in parallel, and outputs a ZIP per language.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Reach out to us at hello@example.com for any inquiries.
